## Summary
<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Type of change
- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation / ADR only
- [ ] chore — tooling, dependencies, config
- [ ] refactor — code restructure, no behaviour change

## Scope
- [ ] backend (Python)
- [ ] frontend (TypeScript)
- [ ] infra (Docker, Bicep, CI)
- [ ] docs / ADRs

## Test plan
- [ ] Unit tests written and passing (`pytest tests/unit`)
- [ ] Type check passes (`mypy src/` or `tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`ruff check .` or `next lint`)
- [ ] End-to-end path manually verified

<!-- Describe how you tested this -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Follows Conventional Commits format
- [ ] ADR written/updated if an architectural decision was made
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if a new environment variable was added
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or config values
- [ ] No `print()` (backend) or `console.log` (frontend) left in
- [ ] Task status updated in phase task registry
